page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance is configured with 12 dedicated physical cores, providing 12 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring no hyperthreading resource sharing. It is equipped with 48.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU accelerators. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without the resource contention typical of shared-core environments, though the lack of local storage requires consideration of network-attached storage latency and throughput limits.

With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.g9i.3xlarge is designed for general-purpose workloads. It is suitable for application servers, web serving, mid-sized databases, and containerized microservices. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core model provides predictable performance for enterprise applications, avoiding the overhead of hyperthreading while maintaining a standard resource density profile.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. Operating at 3.2 GHz, the instance features 12 dedicated physical cores with 12 vCPUs and a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading resource sharing. It is equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying entirely on external network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. This hardware profile makes the ecs.g9i.3xlarge highly suitable for general-purpose workloads such as web serving, application hosting, and containerized microservices that require consistent, dedicated CPU performance without the overhead of shared-core architectures.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 3.2 GHz, 48 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, with no local storage.
